title: Witch Hat Atelier Releases Opening and Ending Theme Song Videos
content: Witch Hat Atelier released the opening and ending theme song videos on Tuesday. The opening theme song “Kaze no Anthem” is performed by Eve feat. suis from Yorushika while the ending theme song “Tada Utsukushii Noroi” is performed by Nakamura Hak.
author: Anime Corner

title: 'Wareware wa Uchuujin' Reveals Main Cast, Additional Staff, Teaser Trailer
content: The official X (formally Twitter) of the Wareware wa Uchuujin ( We Are Aliens ) revealed the main cast, additional staff, teaser visual (pictured right) and teaser trailer on Tuesday. The film is scheduled to premiere in Japanese theaters in 2026. Cast Tsubasa: Ryota Bando ( Fureru.
author: MyAnimeList

title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Season 4 Cancels May 1 Airing
content: The BS11 channel will instead run a special program about the season on May 2 at 10:00 p.m. JST (9:00 a.m. EDT). In the special, cast member Miho Okasaki (Rimuru) and presenter Haruka Mori will join viewers in looking back at the story so far, and looking forward to what is to come in the latest season.
author: ANN

title: Grandgear Film by Godzilla -1.0's Takashi Yamazaki Opens in February 2028 With 'Kaiju Robots'
content: Sony Pictures announced at CinemaCon on Monday that Godzilla Minus One director Takashi Yamazaki 's first English-language film Grandgear will open on February 18, 2028, and added that filming will start soon.
author: ANN

title: Sony Pictures Produces Animated Film of Bloodborne Game
content: Sony Pictures announced at CinemaCon on Monday that it is producing an animated R-rated film adaptation of FromSoftware 's Bloodborne game. PlayStation Productions, Lyrical Animation, and YouTuber jacksepticeye (Seán McLoughlin) are producing the film, with Sony Pictures and Lyrical Animation parent company Lyrical…
author: ANN

title: The Beginning After the End Season 2 Unveils English Dub's Cast, April 15 Launch
content: Crunchyroll announced on Monday it will stream an English dub for the second anime season based on TurtleMe 's The Beginning After The End web novel and its webcomic adaptation on Wednesday.
author: ANN

title: 5 Best Transformations in Dragon Ball Z That Are Not Super Saiyans
content: Dragon Ball Z is the second part of the main story, covered right after Dragon Ball’s anime was concluded. While the original series sets up the foundation of the story, DBZ helped popularize the franchise, setting a high benchmark for future Shonen series.
author: ComicBook

title: Spy x Family Ends Latest Arc With a Shocking Twist
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the Spy x Family manga! The beloved spy action series, Spy x Family , wrapped up its exciting Season 3 in December last year, as fans still await updates on a sequel season.
author: ComicBook

title: Live-Action Sakamoto Days Film's New Video Previews Fight Choreography
content: The official website for the live-action film of Yuuto Suzuki 's Sakamoto Days manga began streaming a character promotional video for the film on Tuesday. The video highlights the fight choreography that Ren Meguro executed as the lead character Tarō Sakamoto, and it also previews the film's theme song "BANG!!" by…
author: ANN

title: 2026’s Most Anticipated Action Fantasy Makes a Stunning Return With Season 2
content: The exciting Spring 2026 anime season marks the return of Wistoria: Wand and Sword after almost two years. The anime, based on a novel by Fujino Omori, debuted in 2024 and became a surprising hit. The author is renowned for the acclaimed series Is It Wrong to Try to Pick Up Girls in a Dungeon?
author: ComicBook
